title: With 30% of votes counted in WC, DA drops below 50%
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - With just more...
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Update

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - With just more than 30% of the vote counted in the Western Cape, the DA has dipped below 50% and at 13:15 had exactly 49% of the votes.

The ANC stood at 22,13% and the PA had 11,29%. The votes at 472 of the 1 572 voting districts had been counted.


> This morning just before 11:00 the ANC had just 18, 85% of the vote but the PA’s percentage of the vote was slightly higher with 12,61% support.


Projections about the Western Cape’s final results made by various election analysts puts the DA above 50%, guaranteeing the blue party an outright majority in the province.

Nationally with 19,33% of the votes counted at 13:15, the ANC led with 43,10%, the DA was at 24,97% and the EFF had 8,73%. MK was just behind them with 8,73% while the PA had amassed 4,2% of the vote.


> Eastern Cape


In the Eastern Cape where 22.76% of the votes have been counted, the ANC was in the lead with 63,72%, the DA had 15,53% and the EFF 9,26%. The PA stood at 2,31%.

Get the election results live with us

Group Editors is proud to announce that we are bringing you the 2024 election results live as the votes are counted - 24 hours a day.


> This year we offer our readers a live feed to all the election results - on each of our six websites.


Just go to the home page of georgeherald.com, mosselbayadvertiser.com, knysnaplettherald.com, graaffreinetadvertiser.com, oudtshoorncourant.com or suidkaapforum.com; click on the Live Election Results banner on the home page; and you will have all the latest national and provincial results at your fingertips.

You will also be able to see how people voted in the respective municipal districts.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
